SELECT t.tuple_col, tuplePlus(t.tuple_col, (10, 20)) FROM tuples_table AS t;
SELECT tuplePlus((SELECT tuple_col FROM tuples_table LIMIT 1), (1, 1));
SELECT tuplePlus(t.tuple_col, o.val) FROM tuples_table AS t JOIN other_table AS o ON t.tuple_col = (1, 2);
SELECT tuplePlus((SELECT sum(tuple_col.1) FROM tuples_table), (SELECT sum(val.2) FROM other_table));
SELECT tuplePlus((SELECT t.tuple_col FROM tuples_table AS t LIMIT 1), (SELECT o.val FROM other_table AS o LIMIT 1));
